title: TE+ Addon Skyblock Beyond
description:
An addon to Technical Enchant+ Renewed by Frektip
New Enchantments: Unusing, Electrified, Cookie Feeder, Block Eater, Resonator
body:
This is an Addon to Frektip's Technical Enchant+ Renewed.
It was developed for my other project called "Skyblock Beyond".

New Enchantments:                                     

- Electrified (When lightning strikes nearby, your tools gets fully repaired. Allows the tool to be repaired in the Tool Recharging Station)

- Unusing (Prevents you from further using the tool when its durability is too low)

- Cookie Feeder (Automatically feeds you cookies from your inventory)

- Block Eater (Mined Blocks are occasionally voided, but your tool repairs a bit from that)

- Resonator I & II (After mining a couple of blocks, the haste effect will be applied)
